en_definition: not very large, important or serious
a thing that shows something else exists or is true
(swept, swept) to move suddenly and / or with force over an area
part of a film showing a particular event
that makes you pay attention to it because it is so interesting and exciting
an area or a region with a particular feature or use
zh_definition: （有某特色或作用的）地区，地带

en_definition: a list of items to be discussed at a meeting
to mention something as a reason or an example, or in order to support what you are saying
zh_definition: 提及（原因）；举出（示例）；列举

en_definition: that is likely to be correct or true
to consider or study an idea, a subject, etc. very carefully
the reporting of news and sport in newspapers and on the radio and television
not controlled by laws or regulations
zh_definition: 不受法规约束的；不受管制的

en_definition: to find or discover somebody / something by looking carefully for them / it
a closely connected group of people, companies, etc. that exchange information, etc.
a complicated system of roads, lines, etc. that are connected to each other and operate together
to take away somebody illegally, especially in order to get money
next to or at the side of something
a main road for travelling long distances
to officially charge somebody with a crime in court
to think or say that somebody / something is responsible for something bad
a blue, brown or purple mark that appears on the skin after somebody has fallen or been hit
a building or part of a hospital where people can go for special medical treatment or advice
to see something happen
a person who sees something happen
zh_definition: 当场看到，目击（尤指罪行或事故）

en_definition: to trick somebody or make them believe something which is not true
on or onto a ship, plane, bus or train
zh_definition: 在（船、飞机、公共汽车、火车等）上；上（船、飞机、公共汽车、火车等）

en_definition: to cut hair from the skin, especially the face
to let or make somebody / something go down
a curved structure that supports the weight of something above it, such as a bridge or the upper part of a building
zh_definition: 拱（支撑如桥梁或房屋上部的弧形结构）

en_definition: to pull somebody / something along with effort and difficulty
an unreasonable dislike of or preference for a person, group, custom, etc.
a belief that something will happen because it is likely
a violent tropical storm with very strong winds
a young sheep
to have an idea that somebody is guilty of something, without having definite proof
a natural tendency for people and animals to behave in a particular way using the knowledge and abilities that they were born with rather than thought or training
a thing that is actually experienced or seen, in contrast to what people might imagine
the true situation and the problems that actually exist in life, in contrast to how you would like life to be
to wish you had the same qualities, possessions, opportunities, etc. as somebody else
the attitude to life and the world
the ability to understand
the process or a period of changing from one state or condition to another
if a ship docks or you dock a ship, it sails into a harbour and stays there
zh_definition: （使船）进港，停靠码头，进入船坞

en_definition: exciting and impressive
sudden, very great and often surprising
zh_definition: 引人注目的；给人印象深刻的
突然的；巨大的；令人吃惊的

en_definition: done naturally, without being forced or practised
not planned but done because you suddenly want to do it
a person who believes in or supports socialism; a member of a political party that believes in socialism
zh_definition: 社会主义者；社会党党员

en_definition: not written or prepared in detail in advance
zh_definition: （演讲、广播等）无底稿的；未详细准备的

en_definition: belonging to the present time
belonging to the same time
zh_definition: 属同时期的；同一时代的

en_definition: a strong regular repeated pattern of sounds or movements
to start to exist
to succeed in accurately expressing a feeling, an atmosphere, etc. in a picture, piece of writing, film, etc.
to catch a person or an animal and keep them as a prisoner or in a confined space
zh_definition: （用图画、文章、电影等准确地）表达，刻画，描述

en_definition: to be cheated
to be certain or likely to happen, or to do something
